boundary: no sealed data read; no development/validation/OOS performance computed; reconstructing this administrative ledger now cannot tune against sealed outcomes (none exist).
closure_statement: The repository and frozen-design census is the CLOSED evidentiary universe. Only pre-freeze, evidence-backed trials are countable. No unidentified or undocumented informal variant is assigned a hypothetical count. "informal MR variants logged before freeze" means informal variants supported by a discoverable pre-freeze record.
conservatism: on genuine ambiguity, INCLUDE (a higher N raises the DSR deflation bar; inclusion is the conservative choice for a significance gate).

excluded_trials.name: regime-gated ETF range reversion
excluded_trials.reason: chartered SEPARATELY and LATER (proposal: MR-002 primary, RNG-002 secondary; 'only after MR-002 harness work is underway'); NO pre-freeze result produced -> excluded

excluded_trials.name: reference RSI mean-reversion example
excluded_trials.reason: explicit 'REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATION, NOT A RECOMMENDED TRADING STRATEGY'; a template, not an examined MR-002-family variant producing a result -> excluded

excluded_trials.name: constraint-presolve / sqrt-equilibration / native-QP / PIQP / solver-intersection characterizations + sample stop reports (2026-07-12+)
excluded_trials.reason: POST-freeze AND numerical-solver/implementation work leaving the economic return series unchanged -> excluded (both exclusion clauses)

exclusion_rule: do NOT count: pure software-debug reruns with identical economic rules; failed executions producing no interpretable result; numerical-solver substitutions leaving the economic return series unchanged; exact reproductions for verification; post-freeze work.
freeze_boundary: Research-Design Freeze SIGNED 2026-07-11; sealed 2026-07-12T02:47:20Z. 'Before the freeze' = on/before 2026-07-11.

included_trials.result_produced: designed config (no pre-freeze backtest; dev perf not computed)

included_trials.duplicate_of: possibly part of RNG-001 development lineage
included_trials.inclusion_or_exclusion_reason: RATIFIED (owner N=5): a documented pre-freeze mean-reversion entry-logic sub-study that tested a distinct economic entry rule and produced a result; the frozen ledger explicitly includes "documented sub-studies"; including an ambiguous trial RAISES the DSR hurdle (conservative).
included_trials.name: RNG range entry-logic sub-study (v0.1/v0.2)

inclusion_rule: count a trial if, BEFORE the freeze, it (1) produced a numerical MR performance result, (2) tested a distinct economic signal/threshold/holding rule/universe/cost/portfolio/model config, (3) was documented as an MR variant/sensitivity/sub-study/candidate, or (4) influenced selection/retention of the frozen A/B/C design.
owner_ratification: N = 5 owner-ratified 2026-07-19: A/B/C explicitly frozen configs; RNG-001 explicitly named in the governing trial-family language; RNG-EntryLogic a documented pre-freeze sub-study with a distinct entry rule + result; no additional evidence-backed pre-freeze trial found in the completed census; unrecorded informal experimentation cannot be assigned a numerical count without inventing evidence.
